# portkey_secret_references (Data Source)

Lists Portkey secret references, optionally filtered by manager_type or name search. Returns a lightweight item per secret (no secret_path, tags, or credentials); use portkey_secret_reference to fetch details.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `manager_type` (String) Optional filter by `manager_type`. Available options: `aws_sm`, `azure_kv`, `hashicorp_vault`.
- `search` (String) Optional case-insensitive name substring search.

### Read-Only

- `secret_references` (Attributes List) List of matching secret references. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secret_references))

<a id="nestedatt--secret_references"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret_references`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Created timestamp.
- `id` (String) Secret reference UUID.
- `manager_type` (String) Secret manager type. Available options: `aws_sm`, `azure_kv`, `hashicorp_vault`.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name.
- `slug` (String) Slug.
- `status` (String) Status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last updated timestamp.
